name: Sunstone Hotel Investors, Inc.
business: Sunstone Hotel Investors, Inc. is a real estate investment trust that owns upper upscale and luxury hotels in convention, urban, and resort destinations. The company leases its hotels to a wholly-owned taxable REIT subsidiary which engages third-party managers to operate the hotels. Revenues are derived from room sales, food and beverage, and other hotel services.

exposures.sentence: We own upper upscale and luxury hotels located in convention, urban, and resort destinations.

catalysts.event: Series G preferred stock dividend rate increase to the greater of 7.5% or Montage Healdsburg annual net operating income yield on total investment
catalysts.sentence: Beginning in the third quarter of 2026, the annual dividend rate will increase to the greater of 7.5% or the rate equal to the Montage Healdsburg’s annual net operating income yield on our total investment in the resort.
